title: Borderline Case Lyrics
wikitext:
[]: "Borderline Case" Lyrics             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Aug 08, 2008 12:22 am In the Symphony concert performance CD, a version of "Borderline Case" is played with lyrics that seem to be in English. Can anyone make them out? I could make out "beneath the" at one point, though that could just be the ever-present apophenia.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Sat Aug 09, 2008 3:02 pm Where did you get "beneath the" from? What part of the song (around what second)? EDIT: Oh I did a little searching. The lyrics are mostly the same as a song from Vox "Evantroduction" by Shiro Sagisu... the lyrics seem to be floating around the Internet. This was my lead: Sailor Star Dust wrote: ...I think one of those Borderline Case w/Chorus (" Born Evil Giant Sinner ..."etc), most likely Take 1 would be good. I could see that as an elegant battle/action music. ...

chunks.content:
Article: Borderline Case Lyrics
[]: "Borderline Case" Lyrics             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Aug 08, 2008 12:22 am In the Symphony concert performance CD, a version of "Borderline Case" is played with lyrics that seem to be in English. Can anyone make them out? I could make out "beneath the" at one point, though that could just be the ever-present apophenia.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Sat Aug 09, 2008 3:02 pm Where did you get "beneath the" from? What part of the song (around what second)? EDIT: Oh I did a little searching. The lyrics are mostly the same as a song from Vox "Evantroduction" by Shiro Sagisu... the lyrics seem to be floating around the Internet. This was my lead: Sailor Star Dust wrote: ...I think one of those Borderline Case w/Chorus (" Born Evil Giant Sinner ..."etc), most likely Take 1 would be good. I could see that as an elegant battle/action music. ...
